about.intro: I am Furqan Ahmad Bhat from Baramulla, pursuing a Bachelor's in Data Science and Physics. I focus on building intelligent systems that solve real-world problems.
about.approach: I approach problems from a systems perspective — understanding input, processing, and output — and designing scalable, efficient solutions.
about.focus: My work integrates Machine Learning, IoT, and real-world deployment, ensuring that solutions are not just theoretical but practical and impactful.

projects.title: Apple Grading System (AGS)
projects.short: AI-based automated apple grading using computer vision
projects.description: A complete automation system designed to classify apples based on quality using Convolutional Neural Networks (CNN). It replaces manual grading with accurate, fast, and scalable AI-based sorting.
projects.problem: Manual grading of apples is inconsistent, slow, and requires heavy labor, leading to inefficiency and loss in quality control.
projects.solution: Developed an AI-based grading system using image processing and CNN models to classify apples based on color, texture, and defects.
projects.system: Image Capture → Preprocessing → CNN Model → Classification → Sorting Mechanism
projects.impact: Improves grading accuracy, reduces human effort, and enables scalable automation in agriculture.

projects.title: Tiwzz (Startup)
projects.description: A startup focused on connecting small rural restaurants with nearby customers through a hyperlocal delivery system within a 10–15 km radius.
projects.problem: Rural restaurants struggle with visibility and customer reach, leading to low daily income.
projects.solution: Created a localized delivery platform that connects nearby customers with small restaurants, increasing accessibility and sales.
projects.system: Restaurant Onboarding → Order Placement → Delivery → Payment
projects.impact: Boosts income of small businesses and strengthens the local economy.

projects.title: IoT Health Monitoring Device
projects.description: An IoT-based system designed for partially paralyzed patients to predict urination timing and alert caregivers in advance.
projects.problem: Patients depend heavily on caregivers for basic needs, affecting independence and dignity.
projects.solution: Built a predictive system using sensor data to anticipate urination events and notify caregivers beforehand.
projects.system: Sensor Data → Pattern Detection → Prediction → Alert System
projects.impact: Improves patient dignity, reduces caregiver workload, and enhances quality of care.
